data.description: WOLFE: S&P 500 MAY NEED DROP TO 6500 BEFORE REBOUND Wolfe Research warns the S&P 500 could fall to ~6500 before a durable rally. Analyst Rob Ginsberg says markets haven’t shown true panic—key signals like volume, put/call ratios, and VIX structure don’t indicate capitulation.

data.title: Xi emphasizes green development, strategic resolve for China's ecological civilization. China accelerates progress in the green sector.
data.description: In Beijing on March 4, 2026, President Xi Jinping highlighted the importance of upholding "strategic resolve" in promoting ecological civilization. The remarks were made during discussions with Chinese lawmakers and political advisors over a decade ago. Xi's emphasis on this concept, as reported by China Daily, underlines the significance of long-term planning and commitment to environmental sustainability. The statement reflects a broader strategy towards achieving ecological goals and underscores the government's dedication to this vision.

data.title: Silynxcom secures $400,000 government tender for protective systems in Asia. Manufacturer of tactical communication devices.
data.description: A company based in Netanya, Israel, Silynxcom Ltd. (NYSE American: SYNX), specializing in ruggedized tactical communication headset devices, revealed its successful bid in Asia through a government tender. The contract secured is worth around $400,000 and involves the provision of advanced tactical protective systems.

data.title: Craft & Art Wine and Spirits partners with Woodstock Goods to expand into hemp-derived THC beverages. Leading sales company.
data.description: A popular spirits sales and operations company based in Somerville, Mass., has ventured into the market of hemp-derived THC beverages, with a notable partnership with the iconic Woodstock brand as its flagship collaborator. Craft & Art Wine and Spirits, renowned for their sales operations and brand development, made this strategic move on March 4, 2026. This expansion signals a new chapter for the company as they tap into the growing trend of THC-infused drinks. It is a significant milestone for Craft & Art, paving the way for diversifying their product offerings and reaching a wider audience.

data.title: Shipley Donuts appoints new COO, CDO, and CFO as it nears 400 shop opening in its 90th year.
data.description: Leading donut brand in the country, Shipley Donuts, has announced the appointment of new executives for the positions of Chief Operating Officer (COO), Chief Development Officer (CDO), and Chief Financial Officer (CFO) as the company gears up to celebrate its 90th year in the industry. The brand is also on the verge of launching its 400th shop. This move comes as part of the company's strategic expansion and growth plans.

data.title: JLL Foundation invests record $5.1M in climate startups in 2025, impacting 62 companies across five continents.
data.description: In the latest annual report, the JLL Foundation outlined its significant impact over a four-year period, involving 62 companies spread across five continents. Specifically, in 2025, the foundation allocated its largest loan pool yet, totaling slightly above $5 million. This investment targeted pioneering climate startups, aimed at hastening the development of solutions for environmental challenges faced globally.

data.title: ISSA partners with cult.fit, India's top fitness brand, as exclusive global education partner in a multi-year deal.
data.description: Phoenix, 4th March 2026 - A recent collaboration has been announced between the International Sports Sciences Association (ISSA), a prominent figure in fitness education since 1988, and cult.fit, India's top fitness brand. The partnership, spanning several years, designates ISSA as the preferred global education partner for cult.fit. This move signifies a significant stride in the fitness industry by combining the expertise of ISSA with the widespread reach of cult.fit in India.

data.title: Dow rises following surprise jobs data; Nvidia and Tesla bounce back in stock market today.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index saw a turnaround following unexpected job data, and also rose amidst news regarding Iran and tariffs. Notably, shares of Nvidia and Tesla, which had recently experienced losses, rebounded. This positive movement in the market comes as a relief to investors. The Dow Jones index showcased an increase, while Nvidia and Tesla stocks showed signs of recovery. This demonstrates the resilience of the market amid uncertain economic conditions.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures fluctuate on Trump tariff hike and Iran's outreach to the U.S.; rise after overnight losses. Tariff hike probable this week.
data.description: Market futures rebounded from earlier losses following reports that Iran had initiated communication with the United States, causing investors to regain confidence. However, Treasury Secretary Bessent indicated a probable tariff increase by President Trump later this week. The Dow Jones futures exhibited fluctuation in response to these factors.

data.title: EUDA Health Holdings repurchases and cancels Streeterville warrant.
data.description: Singapore-based healthcare provider EUDA Health Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: EUDA) disclosed that it has fully repurchased and canceled a warrant initially issued to Streeterville Capital, LLC. EUDA, operating in Singapore, Malaysia, and China, focuses on non-invasive healthcare services in Asia. This decision comes amid the company's dedication to its operations in the region.

data.title: Spreedly enables AI agents to finalize purchases for brands, adding live channel for merchants.
data.description: Top companies are utilizing AI technology to drive agentic commerce and maintain control over their payment systems. In a recent development on March 4, 2026, Spreedly revealed that AI agents now go beyond product recommendations to finalize purchases during checkout. This innovation marks a significant shift in the industry as businesses leverage advanced technology to enhance the shopping experience.

data.title: Haivision's 2026 report highlights trends: remote workflows, AI, SRT, and 5G growth in live production.
data.description: According to the 2026 Broadcast Transformation Report by Haivision, crucial trends impacting live production are outlined. These include the increasing prevalence of remote workflows, the integration of artificial intelligence, the adoption of Secure Reliable Transport (SRT) technology, and the expanding influence of 5G networks.

data.title: New product WaveMaker® 4000A by Coherent for testing Super C-Band DWDM systems.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global sales revenue of the smartphone industry reached over $400 billion in 2020. This marks a significant increase from the previous year, with a growth rate of approximately 10%. The data also shows that the number of smartphones shipped worldwide exceeded 1.5 billion units. The leading manufacturers in this market include Apple, Samsung, and Huawei, with Apple holding the largest market share. These figures demonstrate the continued strong demand for smartphones despite economic challenges and the impact of the pandemic. The trend towards digitalization and the need for connectivity are driving the growth of the smartphone market. Analysts predict that this growth trajectory is likely to continue in the coming years, with emerging technologies and 5G capabilities further stimulating market expansion.

data.title: ABB's advanced space tech wows with high-precision images from EarthDaily's satellite EDC-01, processing over 20 billion pixels/sec.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, EarthDaily, a Canadian geospatial solutions company, announced the first public release of processed images captured by its EDC-01 satellite, developed in collaboration with ABB. The satellite's multispectral imaging payload, operational since 2025, utilizes advanced image fusion algorithms to provide high-precision Earth surface details from diverse areas. With a remarkable pixel processing capacity, EDC-01 digitizes over 20 billion pixels per second, showcasing its advanced technology in orbit.

data.title: Tyson Foods sponsors all varsity sports at Razorback with focus on community, students and nutrition.
data.description: A strengthened collaboration highlights the joint dedication to the community, students, and promoting healthy protein options. The partnership will now cover a broader range of initiatives, increasing the outreach to approximately 10,000 individuals, including students and local residents. This move underscores the collective efforts towards promoting a balanced and nutritious diet among the community members.

data.title: Angi launches new app in ChatGPT for homeowner guidance, connecting with pros.
data.description: A new application is now available to assist homeowners in connecting with contractors effortlessly. The app seamlessly transitions users from receiving advice through conversational AI recommendations in ChatGPT to being matched with experienced professionals on Angi. This innovative process streamlines the homeowner's journey, ensuring they find the right contractor for their needs efficiently. With this app, homeowners can make informed decisions when choosing from a pool of skilled professionals to address their home improvement requirements.

data.title: Blaize (Nasdaq: BZAI, Nasdaq: BZAIW) will report Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on March 24, 2026.
data.description: A company based in El Dorado Hills, California, Blaize, revealed that it will disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. Blaize, identified as a top AI infrastructure provider boosting advanced intelligent systems, specified that the details are set to be made public on a specific date. Traded under the tickers Nasdaq: BZAI and Nasdaq: BZAIW, the announcement came on March 4, 2026.

data.title: LPL Financial promotes Kirby Horan-Adams and Joe Lanser to managing director roles for their leadership contributions.
data.description: LPL has recently announced the promotion of Kirby Horan-Adams and Joe Lanser to managing director positions. This move highlights their increased leadership responsibilities within the company and recognizes their significant contributions over the years. Both individuals have been integral to the firm's success and will now take on more significant roles in guiding its operations. This promotion underscores LPL's commitment to nurturing talent from within, with Horan-Adams and Lanser stepping into key leadership positions.

data.title: AIM ImmunoTech's rights offering expired with $1.8 million in subscriptions for their lead product, Ampligen®, targeting pancreatic cancer.
data.description: AIM ImmunoTech Inc., a company specializing in immuno-pharma, revealed the initial outcomes of its recently concluded Rights Offering which ended on March 3, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. EST. The estimated total subscriptions from the Rights Offering are around $1.8 million. AIM ImmunoTech is concentrated on advancing Ampligen® (rintatolimod) to combat late-stage pancreatic cancer, a challenging global health issue. These results are preliminary and await confirmation by the company and its subscription agent, Broadridge Corporate Issuer Solutions, LLC.

IDF: 'Earlier today (Wednesday), two IDF soldiers were moderately injured as a result of an anti-tank fire toward IDF troops operating in southern Lebanon. The injured soldiers were evacuated to a hospital in order to receive medical treatment, and their families were notified.
